prompt: Write a dry one-paragraph Amazon review of the experience of waking up.
response: I woke up. It happened. I'm not sure if I'd call it an "experience" per se, but I was previously asleep and then I was not. The transition was marked by a series of physiological changes, including increased heart rate and a heightened sense of awareness. The product, "Waking Up," was effective in that it occurred as expected, but it didn't really have any notable features or benefits beyond its basic functionality. I wouldn't say it was particularly enjoyable or unpleasant, it just was. I'd give it 3 stars, I guess.
